name: Heavenly Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafer crumbs, almonds, butter, and sugar in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Pat the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Set aside.
3. Melt the milk chocolate chips over hot (not boiling) water; stir until smooth. Set aside.
4. In a small saucepan, heat the milk and sprinkle gelatin on top. Set aside for 1 minute.
5. Cook the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly, until the gelatin dissolves. Set aside.
6. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, sour cream, and melted chocolate chips; beat until fluffy.
7. Beat in the gelatin mixture and almond extract. Fold in the whipped cream.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Chill until firm (about 3 hours).
9. Run a knife around the edge of the cake to separate from the pan; remove the rim.
10. Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate shavings, if desired.
Makes 1 9-inch Cheesecake
